## [00:00 - 03:01]

Alright guys, so we are ready to roll out our second round of rapid fire testing by now You know the persona that you're gonna use and because we're using the same objective campaign objective We're actually gonna roll out our ads the only difference is we're rolling out different ads to the same persona That was the winner. So you'll see here. We're running with this persona for this client And what I'm gonna do is I'm gonna Duplicate this ad and I'm gonna edit it with different offers and hooks now I go through the training on potential different offers and hooks available in across different industries But what I did is I gave my client a Basically a spreadsheet. This is inside of their Google Drive as well So it's all well organized and I've asked them to outline. I did this while we were in the first round Just to save time so that I had this ready to go by the time we had our personas I asked them to outline different offers So this is our general audience here and these are all the different offers that we have so I've got quite a few of them I've got about seven of them. So what I'm gonna do is I'm actually going to duplicate this ad and The purpose for that is we almost don't want to add another variable to To the equation here meaning if I roll out different images it could just be that The image didn't resonate so by keeping it the same exact image I know that the only thing I'm testing is the actual offer here So here I'm gonna go. This is $99 highlight. So I'm gonna name this $99 highlight so that it's very obvious for me and I will go and edit this so that it is appropriate Okay, so a couple of things here with this client some of the offers that they have it's like highlights or Ballet-age so obviously if that's the situation you may need to edit your ad creative a little bit But ideally try to keep it the image as close as possible if not if you can't Keep it the exact same image image the second part of this is you may have had a couple of ads running inside of that ad set Previously pick the top ad so the one that had the the ultimately look at your soft stats click through rates cost per click and Then messages which ones converted the best So if your ad creative in one of the other tests only got you one message reply That's not enough data to make a call on that conversion rates So at that stage just look at the soft stats like Click through rates and cost per click and run with that ad. Okay, so now I've duplicated All of my offers in here. I'm gonna roll out a few more as well And you see I've named them so that I know exactly which one is which So the next part of this guys is to preview them pull up the link add it to the ad tracking sheet Super important that we do that, right?

## [03:03 - 04:35]

So let's go ahead and do that and You see I created a new tab here with the date so I'm gonna rename this date It is the 4th of May. That's good, and I'm gonna punch in my ads that need approval for the client And we're gonna repeat this for every ad Okay, so I've added the tracking the ad inside of the tracking sheet what I need to remember now is to pause all the ads until the client approves them oops and Then I'm gonna send this ad tracking sheet or I'm gonna remind my client I'm gonna advise my client I should say to go inside of the ad tracking sheet And check on the second tab and approve the ads creative Make sure you get this internally checked as well before you do that step So this is basically how to set up the second round of your rapid fire test Just as a reminder guys You're rolling it out in the existing campaign under the ad set that you decided was gonna be your winning persona You're creating you're basically duplicating a version of the winning ad and You're editing it According to the different offers or hooks that you're gonna try out then you're adding all of those new ad creatives to the new tab inside of the ad creative tracking sheet and Internally checking that then sending that to the client for approval making sure that the ads are on pause while They approve those ads
